user.title: Connect to HomeCasa
user.description: Enter your HomeCasa Cloud URL and the agent API key for this home. HomeCasa becomes the brain for your Voice puck.

error.cannot_connect: Could not reach HomeCasa Cloud. Check the URL and your network.
error.invalid_auth: The agent API key was rejected. Check that it matches this home's tunnel.

abort.already_configured: This HomeCasa agent key is already configured.
